meta.name: Locations
meta.description: Spatial and administrative entities, including geographical coordinates, political jurisdictions, and historical territories.
invariants: Locations MUST be grounded in verifiable geographical coordinates or established naming conventions.
Hierarchical relationships (e.g., containment, jurisdiction) MUST be explicitly defined and traversable.
Historical changes to borders, names, or administrative status MUST be tracked and versioned.
Links to events, people, and organizations occurring at or based in a location MUST be auditable.
Locations MUST be tagged by their nature (e.g., physical, political, jurisdictional, or digital).
Each location symbol MUST represent a distinct entity to prevent spatial ambiguity or duplication.
